name: Peachy soap
description: A cheeky, peachy — shaped soap that's equal parts playful and practical, with a sweet fruity scent that makes it a perennial Valentine's favourite.
archive_note: Released as part of the February 2026 Lush Kitchen XL Valentine's subscription box
nostalgia_angle: Jasmine-scented Lush products carry a rich heritage, and bath melts are treasured for their deeply moisturising, indulgent soak
